description: Archived resolved residuals from sync-contract plan. These items were identified during architecture review and have been implemented in the sync-contract plan (merged to main).

entries.title: Missing bundle metadata fields
entries.target: Added to Task 3: Bundle metadata fields (submitting_creator_id, manuscript_phase, output_manuscript, story_manifest delta)

entries.title: Missing partial apply semantics
entries.scope: DeltaBundle apply pipeline — platform must support partial success (some deltas applied, some rejected)
entries.target: Added Task 6: Partial Apply Semantics to plan

entries.title: Missing local precheck (Stage 0)
entries.scope: Sync client — CLI should validate bundle locally before pushing to platform
entries.target: Added Task 7: Local Precheck Stage to plan

entries.title: Outbox transaction atomicity tests — RESOLVED: 8 comprehensive tests added
entries.scope: crates/nexus-sync/src/outbox.rs — tests for concurrent writes, rollback, state transitions, retry_after atomicity
entries.target: V1.1 — RESOLVED: Added 8 transaction atomicity tests covering concurrent append, rollback, state transitions, retry_after persistence, exponential backoff, bundle payload integrity, and partial apply state atomicity. All tests passing.
entries.closure_note: Implemented 8 comprehensive atomicity tests: concurrent append (10 connections), transaction rollback, state transition atomicity, retry_after persistence atomicity, exponential backoff atomicity, bundle payload integrity, partial apply state persistence atomicity. All 109 nexus-sync tests passing.

entries.title: HTTP body size limit on SyncClient — RESOLVED: 10MB default with builder pattern
entries.target: V1.1 — RESOLVED: Added body_max_size parameter to SyncClient::builder() with 10MB default. Checks Content-Length header and actual body size. Configurable via builder pattern.
entries.closure_note: Added SyncClientBuilder with body_max_size() method. Default 10MB limit. Checks Content-Length header before reading body, and verifies actual body size. Returns Serialization error if limit exceeded. Documented in sync_client.rs module header.

entries.title: No auth match validation in precheck
entries.scope: crates/nexus-sync/src/precheck.rs — submitting_creator_id not validated against authenticated identity
entries.target: Requires daemon context — add when daemon exposes authenticated creator info
entries.closure_note: Implemented AuthContext struct and precheck_bundle_with_auth() in feature/v1.1-wave2-batch2. Validates submitting_creator_id against authenticated_creator_id in multi-creator worlds. Single-creator worlds skip validation. 7 new tests.

entries.title: No retry logic based on retry_after field
entries.target: V1.1 — honor retry_after from conflict response
entries.closure_note: Implemented RetryAfterPolicy enum, mark_conflicted_with_retry() in outbox, updated replay() to include conflicted entries with elapsed retry_after, added retry_after_policy() convenience method to ConflictResponse. SyncConflict error now carries full ConflictResponse. 7 new tests.

entries.title: Partial apply doesn't persist retry state
entries.target: V1.1 — persist partial apply state to outbox for retry
entries.closure_note: Added partial_apply_states table to outbox schema. Implemented persist/load/remove/list methods with upsert semantics. Daemon can resume partial apply from persisted state after restart. 5 new outbox persistence tests + 2 new partial_apply tests.

entries.title: Outbox schema migration path not documented
entries.target: V1.1 — add schema_version column and migration strategy
entries.closure_note: Added comprehensive schema migration documentation to outbox.rs module header. Includes: current schema description, v1.1→v1.2 migration plan (3 steps: add column, write on insert, read on query), ALTER TABLE SQL example, future migration guidelines, and migration safety rules. Documentation-only change per plan scope. Part of Batch A tech debt cleanup (plan v1-tech-debt-cleanup).
entries.closure_evidence: Module documentation updated in outbox.rs with 'Schema Migration Strategy (SYNC-R10)' section. cargo test --all: all 109 nexus-sync tests pass. cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings: 0 warnings. cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check: clean.

entries.title: AutoReject resolution safety mechanism
entries.target: V1.1 — add confirmation prompt for auto-reject in CLI
entries.closure_note: Added auto-reject confirmation prompt in CLI sync resolve command. New confirm_auto_reject() function uses dialoguer::Confirm with default=false. Returns false in non-interactive TTY (requires --force). Added --force flag to SyncCommand::Resolve for automation. Added Resolve subcommand with --resolution flag (auto_accept, auto_reject, manual_review). 4 new unit tests: force bypass, no-TTY behavior, strategy display, ValueEnum parsing. Part of Batch A tech debt cleanup (plan v1-tech-debt-cleanup).
entries.closure_evidence: cargo test --all: 4 new sync tests pass (test_confirm_auto_reject_force_bypasses_prompt, test_confirm_auto_reject_without_force_in_no_tty, test_resolution_strategy_display, test_resolution_strategy_from_str). cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings: 0 warnings. cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check: clean. dialoguer 0.11 dependency added to nexus42 Cargo.toml.
